subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon all the denizens of the heavens gaze upon the countenances of those souls who stand firm in the path of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم یومیست که جمیع اهل آسمان ناظرند بوجوه نفوسی که بر سبیل حق قائم و
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
